site.name: NEOBYTE STUDIOS
site.description: A monoauthor creative studio amplified by artificial intelligence. Sculpting cosmic narratives, engineering immersive worlds, and weaving visual poems through the prism of AI.

hero.subtitle: One creator, AI-amplified. Sculpting ethereal universes that transcend pages, screens, and reality through the prism of digital wonder.

philosophy.label: The Philosophy
philosophy.paragraph1: At NEOBYTE STUDIOS, artificial intelligence is not a shortcut; it is a lens. A prism through which one creator's imagination is refracted into infinite spectra of narrative, design, and interactive experience.
philosophy.paragraph2: Every pixel, every word, every frame passes through a human sensibility. The AI amplifies; the auteur directs. The result is a body of work that feels both impossibly vast and deeply personal.
philosophy.founderImageAlt: The Architect — cosmic silhouette of the NeoByte founder

divisionsGrid.label: The Framework
divisionsGrid.subtitle: Each division carries its own color signature and specialty, unified under the same vision: one mind directs, the AI amplifies.

timeline.label: The Timeline
timeline.subtitle: Three orbits in our ongoing cosmic anthology. Past, present, and the blooming horizon.

entries.title: The Awakening
entries.description: Merging narrative souls with NeoByteWriter v1.0. The first chapter of our cosmic anthology begins.

entries.title: World-Weaving
entries.description: Breathing life into boundless organic worlds. Real-time atmospheric synthesis for deep sensory experiences.

entries.title: Universal Bloom
entries.description: The birth of a complete cinematic ecosystem. Seamless neural narratives spanning the entire digital void.

studioEvolution.label: The Evolution
studioEvolution.subtitle: From ignition to stellar persistence. Our trajectory through the void, one gravity well at a time.

steps.title: Cosmic Ignition
steps.description: Foundation of our gravity-defying architecture. Establishing the core propulsion systems for digital storytelling, prioritizing narrative density within the vacuum of execution.

steps.title: Galactic Expansion
steps.description: Launching our interstellar network. Integrating AI-enhanced luminous rendering protocols across 32+ nodes to illuminate previously uncharted creative territories.

steps.title: Stellar Persistence
steps.description: Deployment of Universe v1. A self-evolving digital ecology operating at light-speed within Jetmir's 'Conscious Script' framework, achieving perpetual existence in the cosmic void.

cta.subtitle: Step into a universe where every idea becomes an experience. Let us craft something extraordinary together.

writer.tagline: Sculpting cosmic narratives and ancient lore from pure thought.
writer.description: Architecting profound narratives through algorithmic deep-lore and cinematic screenwriting. We don't just tell stories; we construct realities.
capabilities: Dynamic dialogue systems driven by emotional logic

features.title: Deep Lore
features.description: Expansive world-building frameworks for complex narrative universes.

features.description: Dynamic dialogue systems powered by emotionally-aware logic.

writer.heroAlt: NeoByteWriter — cosmic pen writing stories in the void

forge.tagline: Crystallizing ethereal geometries into tangible digital worlds.
forge.description: The engineering core. Forge develops the proprietary tools and skeletal frameworks that power modern immersive experiences with unmatched technical precision.
capabilities: Frameworks and libraries for immersive experiences

features.title: Logic-Driven Asset Generation

features.title: Quantum-Safe Data Architecture
features.description: Data architectures resistant to quantum-era cryptographic threats.

forge.heroAlt: NeoByteForge — energy orb of computational creation

games.tagline: Orchestrating interactive symphonies within the AI consciousness.
games.description: Interactive experiences that push the boundaries of immersion through next-gen technology and emotionally resonant design.

features.title: Unreal Integration
features.description: UE5.4 powered real-time photorealism for immersive worlds.

features.description: Cloud rendering with low-latency delivery to any device.

games.heroAlt: NeoByteGames — portal to infinite gaming worlds

vision.tagline: Weaving visual poems and neural cinema from the fabric of stardust.
vision.description: Seeing beyond the event horizon of current technology. Pioneering brand aesthetics and R&D into neural-link interfaces.

R&D on neural interfaces and bio-feedback UI

vision.heroAlt: NeoByteVision — cosmic film reel spiraling through space

mission.label: Mission
mission.suffix: Within the NeoByte universe, {name} carries the charge of turning raw intent into structured reality — operating at the intersection of classical craftsmanship and autonomous intelligence.

capabilities.label: Capabilities
capabilities.subtitle: Core services offered by {name}. All battle-tested through Jetmir's solo-with-AI pipeline.

process.label: Process
process.subtitle: A repeatable orbit from signal to launch. No BS, no bloated kickoffs.

steps.title: Signal
steps.description: We open a channel with the client. Deep listening, constraint mapping, creative alignment.

steps.title: Forge
steps.description: Rapid prototyping with AI-amplified workflows. Ideas become tangible artifacts within days, not months.

steps.title: Refine
steps.description: Human craftsmanship dials in the details. Every pixel, word, and frame is interrogated.

steps.title: Launch
steps.description: Delivery of the finished vessel, with ongoing orbit support for evolution post-release.

artifacts.label: Signature Artifacts
artifacts.subtitle: The studio is young. New artifacts are entering orbit — the archive updates as soon as each one lands.

ctaSection.subtitle: Open a channel with the studio. First contact is always free — signals travel at light-speed.

about.label: Origin Sequence
about.subtitle: Engineering narratives at the intersection of classical craftsmanship and autonomous intelligence. Founded by Jetmir to bridge the void between imagination and execution.

quote.text: We don't build tools; we build vessels for the imagination. Every pixel is a star, every line of code a law of physics for a new world.

divisionsHeader.label: Four Pillars
divisionsHeader.subtitle: Four specialized cores orbiting a single creative consciousness. Each division is an autonomous engine with its own gravity, its own language, its own art of the possible.
